name: MEGACYSTIS-MICROCOLON SYNDROME
definition: MEGALOCYSTIS-MICROCOLON-INTESTINAL HYPOPERISTALSIS SYNDROME (MMIH) functional obstruction of bladder + colon characterized by
dominant_finding: normal amount of amniotic fluid / polyhydramnios (in spite of dilated bladder =
discriminating_features: normal amount of amniotic fluid / polyhydramnios (in spite of dilated bladder =
massive + progressive bladder distension with poor emptying

general: normal amount of amniotic fluid / polyhydramnios (in spite of dilated bladder =
massive + progressive bladder distension with poor emptying
microcolon (= transient feature of "unused colon") with narrow rectum + sigmoid
malrotation / malfixation or foreshortening of small bowel
distended unobstructed bladder with poor / absent muscular function

clinical.Prognosis: lethal in most cases (at a few months of age)
